mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop (name, logo, phone, description, score, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{logo}, #{phone}, #{description}, #{score}, #{status}, #{ownerUserId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo, phone, description, score, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM shop WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shop WHERE status = 1
SELECT id, name, logo, phone, description, score, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM shop WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE shop SET logo = #{logo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
